titleStmt.title: SII 11.191: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 191. (A.R. No. 432 of 1925-26.) AMMINBHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE JAIN Basti.

summary.p: This inscription is dated Chāḷukya-Vīkrama year 36, Nandana, Bhādrapada, amāvāse, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1112, September 22, Sunday. It registers a grant of land, a house site, an oil mill, and a hay-stack made by Chandikabbe, the wife of Uttavarāśi-Paṇḍita of Uṇkal and the daughter of Indraśiva-Jīya, for the satra of the god Ādityadēva. Other gifts by her nephew Rājāditya and her son Hampagāvuṇḍa are also recorded. The village Ammayanabhāvi and the Four-Hundred Mahājanas of the place are praised.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sōbhisutirppa palasige pannircchāsira Some lines in the beginning are broken away and lost.
yisugu . Ānāḍo ḷagrahāraṁ bhūdēviya korala tārada
du bahuvidyānidhi yammayanabhāvi yakhiḷāvaniyoḷ . svasti ya
yadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇapārāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ vi
tmaruṁ jñānātmatatvārṇnavasamētaruṁ lōkavikhyātaruṁ yajanayājana dhyāya
panadānapratigrahaśaṭkarmmaniyataruṁ kṣīrasāgarasayyāśayanōrasthaḷasthitalakṣmī
savakṣasthaḷaruṁ catuśśataparisaṁkhyāprasiddharājapūjitaruṁ samastalōkajanabhājitaruṁ
vamśāgragaṇyaruṁ vandibrindacintāmaṇigaḷuṁ saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararu menisi negaḷda śrī
dagrahāra mammayanabhāviyūroḍeyapramukha nālnūrvvarmmahājanaṁgaḷu dharmmakā
nimittamāgi sakāruṇyadiṁ . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa
nānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmadādityadēvara sthānācāryya padma
ṇḍitaru sakāruṇyadiṁ . samastaguṇasampannarappa pannirvva rggāvuṇḍugaḷuṁ
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷa
ru nuḍidumattennaruṁ Akaḷaṁkacaritraruṁ gōtrapavitraruṁ śaraṇāgatajanarakṣaruṁ śi
gamapradakṣaruṁ saucācāranayavinayavibhūṣaṇaruṁ Īsvarapadmapādasēvakaru
gamabhāvakaruṁ dēvadvijaguruvandyamāna rāsthānaśōbhābhimānaruṁ catussamaya da
ruṁ budhajanādhāra rāhāradānigaḷu lākuḷāgamasiddhānta khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnō ddhārakriya
ḷaru piḍidudaṁ biḍaru nuḍidantemārppa rāś®tajanakaḷpavrikṣaruṁ nāmādisamasta prasa stise
śrīmaduṇka luttavarāsipaṇṇitara sati . Iṁdraśivajīya rātmaje caṁdrānane caṁdikabbe kularatnaṁ bhō
kaṭakaṁge bhakte kavīṁdrastute peṁpuvettu negaḻdaḷu dhareyoḷ . Uttavarāsiya sati suci
yuttame patibhakte kulado ḷācāradoḷaṁ mattenisa daruṁdhati yeṁduttamajana meyde khaṇnikuṁ caṁdele
yaṁ . Āyabbeya dharmmōdyōga menteṁdaḍe . svasti śrīmatu cāḷukyavikramakālada 36
neya nandanasaṁvatsarada bhādrapadadamavāse Ādivāradaṁdu śrīmadādityadēva
ra sattrakke Iṁdrasivajīyara magaḷu caṁdiyakkaṁ goravaṁboladoḷage paṭṭagāṟagoḷa diṁ
baḍagalu tanna tammanu śrāvaṇa dāṟumattarkkeyyu madaṟa baḷiya doṁdu maneyu
moṁdu gāṇamoṁdu baṇabeyoṁddumaṁ dēvara śatrakke biṭṭaḷ Iṁdrasivajīyara
maga dasavarmma Āyana magaṁ rājāditya gaḷaṁ biṭṭa sattrakke koṭṭa taḷige Aydu
Āyabbeya maga paṇḍitara haṁpagāvuṇḍaṁ koṭṭa taḷige mūṟu . mattaṁ goravagēriya
dēvaputtrakaruṁ bāḍasarokkalu mukhyamāgi Aṟuvattokkaluṁ poladoḷ māḍida
llaṁ mallikārjjunadēvara snānanivēdyakke Okkalo ḷoṁdu pāgama nācaṁdrārkka tā
raṁ koṭṭaru . tra bāḍasa dēvaṇnaṁ satrakke koṭṭa taḷige mūṟu mallikā[rjjuna-]
dēvargge koṭṭa Oṁdu . nakaravāgila gaḍiyalu tiṁgaḷiṁ geraḍu mānu
satrakke koṭṭaru . Idananīyaṁdadiye pāḷisidavaṁ giṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhi saṁbhavikuṁ ke
kurukṣētrameṁbivaroḷu pēsade pārvvaraṁ gorava
gōbrā pāpa meydugu mavaṁ bīḷguṁ ni daṁgaḷoḷ . svadattaṁ
dattaṁ yō saṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 11.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
